prompt: Create a workflow with a cron trigger every hour that fetches pending invoices. For each invoice, check if it is overdue. Overdue invoices get a reminder email sent and their status updated to "reminded". Non-overdue invoices within 3 days of due date get a courtesy reminder. All others are skipped. Return a summary of actions taken.

checklist.item: Has a cron trigger that fires every hour
Fetches pending invoices from a data source
Loops over each fetched invoice individually
Branches based on whether the invoice is overdue
Has a secondary branch for non-overdue invoices: within 3 days of due date vs. all others
Skips invoices that are neither overdue nor within 3 days of due date
Sends a reminder email for overdue invoices
Updates the status of overdue invoices to 'reminded'
Sends a courtesy reminder email for invoices within 3 days of due date
Evaluates overdue status by comparing the invoice due date against the current date/time
Evaluates proximity to due date using a 3-day threshold from the current date/time
Returns a summary of actions taken across all processed invoices
Summary includes counts or details of overdue reminders sent, courtesy reminders sent, and invoices skipped
